use_cases: Interactive headlines on landing pages with hover-triggered wave animations
CTA buttons and text links with cascading character effects
Navigation items or menu labels with playful motion
Brand typography elements with spring-physics character animations
Decorative text displays for websites requiring subtle interactivity
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-based wave text component that applies spring physics animations to individual characters on hover, creating a cascading wave effect from left to right. Built with React, Tailwind CSS, and configurable text/className props for flexible styling integration across landing pages and interactive UI elements.
